testsuite.name: BullsCowsTest
testsuite.system-out: ?[1;31m Start test 1?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 1 Input the number of possible symbols in the code: > 10 Okay, let's start the game! The secret is prepared: * (0-9) 0123456789 Turn 1: > 0 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 1 Grade: None. Turn 3: > 2 Grade: None. Turn 4: > 3 Grade: None. Turn 5: > 4 Grade: 1 bulls. Congratulations! You guessed the secret code. ?[1;31m Start test 2?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 4 Input the number of possible symbols in the code: > 10 Okay, let's start the game! The secret is prepared: **** (0-9) 0123456789 Turn 1: > 0000 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 1111 Grade: None. Turn 3: > 2222 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 4: > 3333 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 5: > 4444 Grade: None. Turn 6: > 5555 Grade: None. Turn 7: > 6666 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 8: > 7777 Grade: 1 bull(s). Turn 9: > 2367 Grade: 1 bull(s) 3 cow(s). Turn 10: > 3267 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 11: > 6237 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 12: > 2637 Grade: 2 bull(s) 2 cow(s). Turn 13: > 3627 Grade: 1 bull(s) 3 cow(s). Turn 14: > 6327 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 15: > 7326 Grade: 4 cow(s). Turn 21: > 2673 Grade: 4 bulls. Congratulations! You guessed the secret code. ?[1;31m Start test 3?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 6 Input the number of possible symbols in the code: > 10 Okay, let's start the game!
